fields.name: projects
fields.description: A list of projects under the owner.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for projects returned from the connection.

arguments.name: search
arguments.description: Query to search projects by, currently only searching by name.

arguments.name: states
arguments.description: A list of states to filter the projects by.

enums.name: ProjectCardArchivedState
enums.description: The possible archived states of a project card.

values.name: NOT_ARCHIVED
values.description: A project card that is not archived.

enums.name: ProjectColumnPurpose
enums.description: The semantic purpose of the column - todo, in progress, or done.

values.name: DONE
values.description: The column contains cards which are complete.

values.name: IN_PROGRESS
values.description: The column contains cards which are currently being worked on.

values.name: TODO
values.description: The column contains cards still to be worked on.

enums.name: ProjectOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which project connections can be ordered.

values.name: AUTOMATED_KANBAN_V2
values.description: Create a board with v2 triggers to automatically move cards across To do, In progress and Done columns.

values.name: AUTOMATED_REVIEWS_KANBAN
values.description: Create a board with triggers to automatically move cards across columns with review automation.

values.name: BASIC_KANBAN
values.description: Create a board with columns for To do, In progress and Done.

values.name: BUG_TRIAGE
values.description: Create a board to triage and prioritize bugs with To do, priority, and Done columns.
